title: Complex Numbers
description: The imaginary unit, complex arithmetic, and the Argand diagram.
objectives: Explain why the imaginary unit i is introduced, and write complex numbers in the standard form a + bi
Add, subtract, and multiply complex numbers, simplifying using i^2 = -1
Represent a complex number as a point on the Argand diagram

lessons.title: Imaginary numbers, complex arithmetic, and the Argand diagram
